calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Lingys for (petitioner) Jeanette Robinson.

Mr. Lingys stated that she does not have the executor's verification on the declaration and that she can sign it herself because the declaration has to do with costs generated by her firm. In addition Ms. Lingys indicated that she is not in agreement with the amount the probate examiner is recommending in fees, that they have incurred over $10,000.00 in fees, there is a question of valuation, asked to be allowed to request hourly fees and stated that she will submit another declaration regarding hours incurred. Ms. Lingys is to file her declaration within a week. The accounting petition was continued to February 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The matter will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Maloney. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Continued To Jan-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Lyngis for Jeanette Robinson.

The Court noted that there is no opposition. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
